label: Weather & Atmosphere
description:
WMO cloud genera, precipitation types, storm categories, atmospheric phenomena and layers, Beaufort/Saffir-Simpson/Fujita scales, Köppen climate zones, and ocean-atmosphere systems (ENSO, NAO, etc.).

Atom IDs: weather:cloud:*, weather:storm:*, weather:phenomenon:*, weather:climate:*, weather:layer:*, weather:scale:*
